transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi Aria, I'd like to schedule a cavity follow‑up for June 4, 2026 at 1 PM, please.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help you schedule that cavity follow up for June fourth at one point zero PM. May I have your name for the appointment

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: May I have your name, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your appointment is booked for pre assure on June fourth at one point zero PM for a cavity follow up. Confirmation ID is BSD one zero zero two is the name correct as pre assure or did you mean pre assha

transcript.text:
No, it’s Priya Shah—P‑R‑I‑Y‑A space S‑H‑A‑H. Thank you.  
Goodbye.

transcript.text: Um, I'll update the name to Priya Shah for your appointment on June fourth at one point zero PM. Your confirmation ID remains BSD one zero two
